text.title: Requirements Prioritization Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real engagements applying requirements-prioritization. Each entry pairs symptom + root cause + fix.

antipattern.fix: Reject distributions where Must >70%; force redistribution.

antipattern.symptom: Run MoSCoW; rerun RICE when result displeases.
antipattern.fix: Lock method before scoring; method change requires governance review.
Couple value with effort; reject score sheets missing effort column.

antipattern.symptom: Final priority set by HiPPO over scored output.
antipattern.fix: HiPPO veto requires written justification appended to record.
